story.iWant: coin detection algorithm để identify coin names trên web pages
story.soThat: extension can find relevant coins to analyze

subtasks.subtask: Define TypeScript interfaces cho detection results
Create main detection function: `detectCoins(element: HTMLElement): CoinDetection[]`
Create regex patterns cho common coin names (Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, etc.)
Create function to match coin names trong text content
Create regex patterns cho coin symbols (BTC, ETH, SOL, etc.)
Create function to match coin symbols trong text content
Map symbols to coin names (symbol → name mapping)
Create regex patterns cho price formats (e.g., "$45,000", "45,000 USD", "€40,000")
Create function to extract price từ text near coin symbols
Parse price values (handle commas, decimals, currency symbols)
Associate prices với nearby coin symbols
Create function to build detection result object
Create test HTML file với various coin formats
Test coin name detection (e.g., "Bitcoin is popular")
Test edge cases (multiple coins, nested elements, etc.)
Test edge cases và error handling

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Pattern matching cho common coin names (Bitcoin, Ethereum, etc.)
Pattern matching cho coin symbols (BTC, ETH, etc.)
Pattern matching cho coin symbols với prices (BTC $45,000)
Detection returns: `{ element: HTMLElement, name: string, symbol?: string, price?: number }`
Detection tested trên sample HTML với various coin formats

doc.title: Browser Extension Architecture - Suna.so
doc.snippet: Example coin detection pattern với COIN_PATTERNS regex, detectCoins function using TreeWalker, và CoinMatch interface. Pattern matching for coin names, symbols, và prices.

doc.title: Suna.so Browser Extension - Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: Epic 11 goal: Implement coin name detection trên web pages và inject "Analyze with Suna" buttons next to detected coins. Core functionality cho phép user discover và trigger analysis từ any crypto website.

doc.title: Suna.so Browser Extension - Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: As a developer, I want coin detection algorithm để identify coin names trên web pages, So that extension can find relevant coins to analyze. Acceptance criteria include coin-detector.ts module, pattern matching for names/symbols/prices, detection result structure, và testing.

doc.title: ChainLens Automation Integration
doc.snippet: Reference implementation for crypto pattern matching. Includes regex patterns for coin names, symbols, và token addresses. Can reference for pattern design but adapt for extension use case.

doc.title: Reddit Service
doc.snippet: Reference for crypto-related keywords list: bitcoin, btc, ethereum, eth, crypto, cryptocurrency, blockchain, defi, nft, altcoin, trading, etc. Can reference for coin name patterns.

file.reason: Reference implementation for coin detection. Shows COIN_PATTERNS regex, TreeWalker usage, và CoinMatch interface structure. Can use as starting point but enhance với more patterns và price detection.
Target location for coin-detector.ts module. Shared module can be used by content script và popup.
Optional location for TypeScript type definitions if types become complex. Can define CoinDetection interface here.

constraint.description: Use DOM traversal (TreeWalker) để scan page content. Pattern matching via regex cho coin names, symbols, và prices. Return structured results với element references. Non-intrusive: detection doesn't modify page.
Common coins: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, Cardano, Polygon, etc. Case-insensitive matching. Handle variations và abbreviations. Consider common misspellings (optional).
Common symbols: BTC, ETH, SOL, ADA, MATIC, etc. Handle with/without currency symbols ($BTC, BTC). Map symbols to full names. Consider symbol variations.
Common formats: "$45,000", "45,000 USD", "€40,000", "45k". Extract numeric values. Handle currency symbols và formatting. Associate prices với nearby coin symbols.
Must return CoinDetection interface: { element: HTMLElement, name: string, symbol?: string, price?: number }. Element reference required for UI injection. Name required, symbol và price optional.
Module at `extension/src/shared/coin-detector.ts` - shared code (can be used by content script và popup). This is shared code, not content script specific.

interface.name: CoinDetection Interface
interface.signature: interface CoinDetection { element: HTMLElement; name: string; symbol?: string; price?: number; }

tests.standards: Testing standards: Unit test coin-detector.ts module, test pattern matching functions individually, test detection result structure, test với sample HTML files, test edge cases và error handling, verify detection accuracy. Use DOM testing utilities hoặc mock HTMLElement objects.

test.idea: Unit test: Verify coin-detector.ts module exports detectCoins function và CoinDetection type
Test coin name pattern matching: "Bitcoin is popular", "ethereum network", "SOLANA blockchain"
Test coin symbol pattern matching: "BTC", "$BTC", "btc", "ETH price"
Test price parsing: handle commas, decimals, currency symbols correctly
Test detection result structure: verify all fields present, element reference valid, optional fields handled
Test với sample HTML: create test HTML với various coin formats và verify detection works
Test edge cases: multiple coins in same element, nested elements, empty text nodes, special characters
Test performance: verify detection doesn't slow down page (use requestIdleCallback if needed)
